title: Build Smarter Games with AI

synopsis: AI is reshaping every layer of game design â from how worlds are built to how characters talk back to you. In this course, you'll learn how to use generative AI tools to prototype, design, and pitch interactive experiences, whether you're aiming for a career in gaming or just want to build something people actually play.
rationale: Gaming is one of the fastest-growing industries adopting generative AI, yet most young adults interested in game dev have no structured path to understand how these tools integrate into real workflows.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can use generative AI tools to design, prototype, and present a playable or pitch-ready interactive media concept.
source_signals: the science and implications of generative ai
Large language models are having their Stable Diffusion moment
